name: Butter Balls Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into portions and place them in a saucepan with celery leaves, bay leaf, peppercorns, and 1 teaspoon of salt. Add hot water to cover, bring to a boil, then simmer covered over low heat for about one hour, or until the chicken is tender.
2. Strain the broth, return it to the saucepan, cut the chicken into small pieces, and add them back to the broth with celery and parsley. Simmer briefly.
3. To make the butter balls, cream together 2 tablespoons of butter, eggs, flour, and 1/4 teaspoon salt until well combined and forming a soft batter.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the simmering soup, cover, and let stand for 5 minutes over low heat.
